summary: Iteration 32: Cuentas Directory Grid Enhancements - ALL 10 TEST SCENARIOS PASSED. Tested date format with year, Hace column, color coding, column resize, and sorting functionality.

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warnings about span inside tr/tbody - cosmetic only, caused by development tooling injection, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: 1. 'Últ. compra' column shows full date with year (e.g., '06 nov. 2023', '09 dic. 2025')
2. New 'Hace' column shows days since last purchase (e.g., '840d', '76d', '123d')
3. 'Hace' column has color coding: green/emerald (≤30d), blue (≤90d), amber (≤180d), red (>180d)
4. 8 resize handles exist between column headers (cursor-col-resize class)
5. Column widths persist in localStorage after resize (key: 'crm_col_widths')
6. Sorting by 'Cant.' (qty_12m) descending shows strongest customers first (16,368 → 2,910 → 2,888 → 2,674 → 1,999)
7. Sorting by '#Comp.' (orders_12m) descending shows most frequent buyers first (8,590 → 110 → 100 → 60 → 57)
8. Sorting by 'Hace' works correctly (uses same sort key as 'Últ. compra' - last_purchase)
9. All column headers display correctly: CUENTA, DEPTO, ULT.COMPRA, HACE, CANT., #COMP., TEL, %YTD
10. WhatsApp links work correctly (found 15 links on page, format: https://wa.me/51XXXXXXXXX)
critical_code_review_comments: CuentasDirectoryGrid.jsx: Well-implemented with proper date formatting (fmtDate), days calculation (daysSince/fmtDays), and color coding (daysColor)
ResizeHandle component: Clean mouse event handling with proper event propagation stopping
localStorage persistence: Correctly saves column widths under 'crm_col_widths' key
Sorting: Hace column correctly uses 'last_purchase' as sortKey, enabling date-based sorting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cuentas Directory Grid enhancements complete. Key features: (1) Date format with year in 'Últ. compra' column, (2) New 'Hace' column with days since last purchase and color coding, (3) Resizable columns with localStorage persistence. All sorting options work correctly including qty_12m, orders_12m, and last_purchase (via Hace header). The grid component is rendered twice (desktop left pane + mobile) so use get_by_test_id('left-pane').locator() or .first for selectors.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. All directory grid enhancements working as specified.
